package service

import (
	ctxpkg "context"
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

type requestKey struct{}

type Worker struct {
	name string
}

func LoadPatient(ctx ctxpkg.Context, db *sql.DB, patientID string) error {
	ctx = ctxpkg.WithValue(ctx, requestKey{}, patientID)
	_, err := db.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT 1")
	return err
}

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	detached := ctxpkg.WithoutCancel(r.Context())
	go func(bg ctxpkg.Context) {
		publishAudit(bg)
	}(detached)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte("ok"))
}

func publishAudit(ctx ctxpkg.Context) {}

func newClient() *http.Client {
	return &http.Client{}
}
